mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inspection_standard
inspection_name, part_code, part_name, implementation_cycle, cycle_unit, data_type, signal_type, implementation_method, inspection_content, inspection_part, qualitative_standard, standard_category, quantitative_standard, unit_of_measurement, profession, upper_limit, lower_limit, id_location_code, id_location_name, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{inspectionName}, #{partCode}, #{partName}, #{implementationCycle}, #{cycleUnit}, #{dataType}, #{signalType}, #{implementationMethod}, #{inspectionContent}, #{inspectionPart}, #{qualitativeStandard}, #{standardCategory}, #{quantitativeStandard}, #{unitOfMeasurement}, #{profession}, #{upperLimit}, #{lowerLimit}, #{idLocationCode}, #{idLocationName}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT ins.id, ins.inspection_name AS inspectionName, ins.part_code AS partCode, ins.part_name AS partName, ins.implementation_cycle AS implementationCycle, ins.cycle_unit AS cycleUnit, ins.data_type AS dataType, ins.signal_type AS signalType, ins.implementation_method AS implementationMethod, ins.inspection_content AS inspectionContent, ins.inspection_part AS inspectionPart, ins.qualitative_standard AS qualitativeStandard, ins.standard_category AS standardCategory, ins.quantitative_standard AS quantitativeStandard, ins.unit_of_measurement AS unitOfMeasurement, ins.profession, ins.upper_limit AS upperLimit, ins.lower_limit AS lowerLimit, ins.id_location_code AS idLocationCode, ins.id_location_name AS idLocationName, ins.creator_id AS creatorId, ins.created_at AS createdAt, ins.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inspection_standard ins WHERE ins.id = #{id}
AND ins.creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT id, inspection_name AS inspectionName, part_code AS partCode, part_name AS partName, implementation_cycle AS implementationCycle, cycle_unit AS cycleUnit, data_type AS dataType, signal_type AS signalType, implementation_method AS implementationMethod, inspection_content AS inspectionContent, inspection_part AS inspectionPart, qualitative_standard AS qualitativeStandard, standard_category AS standardCategory, quantitative_standard AS quantitativeStandard, unit_of_measurement AS unitOfMeasurement, profession, upper_limit AS upperLimit, lower_limit AS lowerLimit, id_location_code AS idLocationCode, id_location_name AS idLocationName, creator_id AS creatorId, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM inspection_standard
AND part_code = #{partCode}
